name: Lusamine's Exhausted Experience
description:
"My sweet Pokémon... I promise I'll keep you safe... I'll protect you with my love..."

____________________

As the President and Owner of the Aether Foundation, Lusamine often found herself to be INCREDIBLY over swamped with work given her personal goals for the things she's got planned. She had so much work in fact, that she hasn't really had the time to relax or spend any time for herself, so she's found herself to be rather sore as of late.
But after a recent annoyance in the form of having to deal with new hires and promotions, after what's felt like weeks worths of non-stop working, Lusamine finally reached a point where she's had enough workers in the Aether Foundation for her to be able to relax without worry. So, with one last check-in on her workers, she retreats to her private office to kick back and relax, resting her feet on her desk as she began to doze off.
_____________________

General scenario + Foot fetish scenario

(Sorta Netori? Then again, her husband doesn't remember anything, and she lets him live his life even after she finds out what happened to him, so I'm not sure if she's still technically married or not)

DEAD DOVE WARN: Somnophilia, if you're not comfortable with that, then you can just buck off since this isn't for you

This has been somewhat formatted to where if one wanted to be a Pokémon or another human they COULD... But then again, I doubt anyone's actually THAT desperate enough, but either way go wild
